# Pasadena California

> Geotechnical engineering company in Canada, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Canada.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
